column1: # GL snapshot test registry — visual regression tests for long-running
#   - the example must hold its window open long enough to be captured
#     (i.e. a game loop like `for _ in 0..1000000 { ... }`, not a finite
#   - `gl_create_window(..., "NameHere")` must set a title matching the
#     window_regex column so xdotool can find it.
# Short-lived examples (00-smoke etc.) use a dedicated snap script (see
# inlines a long-running variant of their body.
# One line per golden-PNG test; tab-separated.
#   3. wait_seconds         seconds to let the example render before `import`
#   4. window_regex         xdotool --name regex to locate the window (case-ins)
#                           send P, wait 200ms).  Use xdotool key names
# Comment lines start with '#'; blank lines are ignored.
#   2. `make update-gl-snapshots` to create the golden PNG
#   3. Inspect the golden in tests/golden/ and commit
